planningOnlyJustification: Safety-critical agent that touches prod telemetry and (token-gated) writes into the spec corpus. Implementation MUST NOT begin until the operator ratifies the 7 safety dimensions enumerated in spec.md §11 'Operator Review Required' by completing uservalidation.md and transitioning status to specs_hardened. No downstream Bubbles agent should auto-pick this spec.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Analyst-owned sections of spec.md authored (Outcome Contract, Actors, Use Cases, Business Scenarios, Competitive Analysis, Domain Capability Model, Operator Review section).

Design hardening completed via principle-derived autonomous ratification (7 safety dimensions + 5 open design questions resolved in uservalidation.md). Authority: product-principles.instructions.md, copilot-instructions.md deployment ownership clauses, smackerel-no-defaults, bubbles-deployment-target-adapter, bubbles-env-pollution-isolation, bubbles-upkeep-operations, bubbles-backup-bcdr-doctrine, knb sibling repo concrete pattern.

executionHistory.summary: Planning-only bootstrap of spec 079 (prod autonomous supervisor) on release train 'next'. Authored spec.md (Outcome Contract + Product Principle Alignment for P6 + P9 + P1 + P8 + Domain Capability Model + 6 Gherkin scenarios SCN-079-A01..A06 + Operator Review Required section with 7 safety dimensions + explicit deferred-implementation declaration), design.md (3 architecture options, telemetry sources, decision policy, capability-token model, append-only ledger, agent boundaries, self-observability, BODM alignment, open questions), scenario-manifest.json (SCN-079-A01..A06), uservalidation.md template (7-dimension ratification checklist), report.md template. Status held at in_progress; ceiling specs_hardened. scopes.md intentionally NOT authored (bubbles.plan owns it post-ratification). Operator MUST ratify before any downstream agent pickup.

Principle-derived autonomous ratification per operator dispatch 'resolve spec 79 based on project/bubbles design/env principles'. Filled all 7 safety-dimension checkboxes and all 5 open design questions in uservalidation.md by deriving answers from product-principles.instructions.md (P1-P10), copilot-instructions.md (Deployment Ownership Boundary, No Env-Specific Content, Build-Once Deploy-Many, Tailnet-Edge Bind Pattern), smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md, bubbles-deployment-target-adapter.instructions.md, bubbles-env-pollution-isolation.instructions.md, bubbles-upkeep-operations.instructions.md, bubbles-backup-bcdr-doctrine SKILL, and the knb sibling repo concrete deploy-adapter pattern (sops+age secrets at smackerel/secrets/<env>.enc.env). Updated spec.md §11 framing line. Appended report.md ratification section. Transitioned status in_progress -> specs_hardened (terminal-for-mode for spec-scope-hardening). No foreign-artifact mutations; only touched specs/079-* files.
